summary: Classified the ten open PRs independently from the hydrated preflight artifact. No security-sensitive refs were present. No close, merge, fix, or PR-opening actions are planned because instant close, low-signal close, merge, fix, and raise_pr are disabled for this shard; maintainer-owned/product-direction PRs are routed to exact needs_human decisions.

actions.reason: Keep open as an independent PR inventory item; proof and CI failures block merge-like conclusions, and close/low-signal cleanup is disabled for this job.
Keep open as an independent, non-merge-ready PR; technical proof is missing and this job cannot repair or merge it.
Maintainer-owned broad design/RFD work needs maintainer/product judgment; autonomous close, merge, and fix are disabled.
Product fit and maintainer review remain the exact blocker for the WebChat shortcut implementation; keep it out of autonomous close/merge/fix.
Maintainer-authored retry behavior replacement has failing gates and review-sensitive behavior; human maintainer review is required before any merge path.
Maintainer draft canonical skills-snapshot work has explicit bot findings and failed proof; no autonomous repair or merge is allowed in this job.

Keep open as an independent provider-catalog PR; it needs proof/rebase/maintainer validation, but is not a low-signal or duplicate close candidate.
Keep open as an independent, useful PR; merge readiness depends on resolving/confirming review-bot findings and is outside this close-only classification shard.
Keep open as an independent useful build/runtime fix candidate; rebase, proof, and minor bot finding remain before any merge path.
